reviews.review_description: It was really cool and it’s free so what’s not to like
Great tour, just wish they had a 360° view of the room where you can see into space
An unbelieveably detailed tour of ISS with razor sharp imagery & throrough, detailed explanations!

developer_response.body: We're thankful for the review BoxMacCary. It's great to hear that we succeded at what we wanted to achieve - spreading knowledge about this amazing piece of technology.

reviews.review_description:
I want more, please. Everyone who owns the Go needs this one. Regardless of interest because someone you know will love it.

Definitely one of the best educational experiences available.

Swivel chair highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you sir! You're truly a Real Deal! :)

reviews.review_description: Watched from my gear vr in Nigeria. Absolutely awesome. Wish it was on psvr too

developer_response.body: Hey, Bolaj, thanks for the review. You might be pleased to hear that we're indeed planning on bringing ISS Tour VR to PSVR in the future!

reviews.review_title: Working like a charm on my S7 edge
reviews.review_description: Very informative app regarding life on ISS although it is not a full VR experience but VR photoshots of an ISS compartments/nodes with detailed explaining 2d videos of different modules. But still in this small file size experience is really immersive and informative. Looking forward to full VR experience of ISS from developers if feasible
Nit very tech savy, but it seems I can only walk backwards?

developer_response.body:
Hey Dugy01!
Could you give us more information about the issue you encountered? Like when and where exactly did it happen? This will help us identify the issue and help you out.

reviews.review_description: Downloaded easily! Fantastic tour of the ISS!
